title: A high throughput DNA extraction method from chemotypically heterogeneous plant species
author: Unknown

materials.name: DNA extraction buffer
materials.details: 200 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0), 200 mM NaCl, 25 mM EDTA, 1% PVP

steps.title: Macerate plant tissue
steps.instruction: Macerate plant tissue of about 1.0 cm2 in DNA extraction buffer [200 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0), 200 mM NaCl and 25 mM EDTA, and 1% PVP].

steps.title: Treat lysate with Phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol
steps.instruction: Treat the lysate with Phenol: chloroform: isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1).

steps.title: Precipitate DNA
steps.instruction: Precipitate DNA with ethanol and sodium chloride.
